rest of their revenue varies.

Public schools are your state schools

Student debt is a national crisis.

The reality is there probably isn't

America. One of the proposed solutions

is an income share agreement.
Essentially, instead of taking out loans,

I do not agree with free college.

Free college is a great idea. I

In other countries taxpayers foot most

countries across the world provide free

The solution probably won't be that
simple in the U.S. But with student

debt rising and the need for
a college degree becoming more and more

important, the future of American
